free_text: Yields of short-lived fission products following 238U
Core of fast port in reactor.
Depleted uranium foils lined in a Cd-covered
from 0.3 to 4000 sec following rapid and uniform
transfer of fission fragments with helium-jet/tape
Bateman equations were used to account for beta chain
contributions to the yields.  The beta-to-gamma
ratios were taken from ENSDF except as noted under
No reply to author proof sent to J. Campbell.
